chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-5459 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.21189/2023 2. For order on Misc. No.21190/2023 3. For order on Nazir Report dated 03.02.2021 4. For order on Misc. No.1277/2021 5. For order on Misc. No.28700/2020 6. For order on Misc. No.28856/2020 7. For order on Misc. No.23306/2020 8. For hearing of main case 18.09.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Kareem Khan, advocate for the respondent No.10 Ms. Humaira Jatoi, advocate for the SBCA Mr. Mukarak Ali Shah, advocate for KDA PI Nazeer PS Taimuria Karachi --------- None present for the petitioner without intimation despite this being a date fixed matter. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition any further. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). In any event, SBCA shall continue to carry out its obligations in accordance with law in respect of the complaint made by the petitioner. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
